summary: Built the daily export pipeline that bundles curated skills from va and ships them to zoputer via the Consulting API. Pipeline runs automatically at 9 AM ET via DAILY_EXPORT_LIBRARIAN scheduled agent, exports only Tier 0 skills with changes since last export, creates tarballs with metadata and checksums, logs to audit system, and notifies V via SMS.
learnings: bundle_manager.py (D1.3) created JSON bundles but daily export needs tarballs - updated transmit_bundle to handle both formats
Temp directories get cleaned up before async operations - use persistent bundle storage (N5/data/bundles/)
Git-based change detection works well for skills but requires tracking last_export.json state
